text.title: Portfolio Strategy (70/20/10) Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding Portfolio Strategy (70/20/10) plus the universal skip/run routing pair (referenced by the decision tree).

rule.statement: Engineering capacity MUST default to 70% H1 / 20% H2 / 10% H3; deviations MUST cite a macro condition (Growth / Stable / Recession) and timeframe.
rule.rationale: Without a default allocation, H1 work consumes 100% of capacity by deadline pressure; the explicit default is the forcing function for innovation budget.

rule.statement: Every active bet MUST be tagged H1 / H2 / H3 with the rationale recorded; untagged bets MUST be classified before next sprint kickoff.
rule.rationale: Untagged bets distort allocation reporting; the explicit tag is the input to the allocator script.

rule.statement: Every H3 bet MUST carry pre-registered kill criteria (signal threshold + observation window); H3 without kill criteria MUST be reclassified or terminated.
rule.rationale: H3 bets without kill criteria absorb capacity indefinitely; pre-registration is the only structural gate against zombie innovation.

rule.statement: The macro condition (Growth / Stable / Recession) MUST be reviewed quarterly with named indicators (revenue growth %, net cash, market index); intra-quarter changes require named trigger.
rule.rationale: Implicit macro reads produce panic re-allocations on noise; quarterly review with named indicators is the structural anchor.

rule.statement: Reallocating capacity from H3 to H1 MUST come with a written-down decision record (date, indicators, expected duration); silent re-allocation MUST be rejected at retro.
rule.rationale: Silent re-allocations turn into permanent allocation drift; the decision record is the only durable counter.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` do not ALL hold OR any disqualifier in `## Skip If` fires, the agent MUST skip this methodology and document the skip reason in the cycle artefact.
rule.rationale: A minimum-form decision tree must route 'preconditions-not-satisfied' to skip; this rule is the canonical target.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` ALL hold AND no disqualifier fires, the agent MUST run the methodology end-to-end and produce the artefact specified in 02-output-contract.xml.
rule.rationale: Pair to skip-this-methodology; together they form the always-present minimal route.
